ticket.subject: Is it possible to connect a UPS Account with China...
ticket.raw_subject: Is it possible to connect a UPS Account with China...
ticket.description:
Is it possible to connect a UPS Account with China origin and use the Importer of Record to declare cost value? Do you support YunExpress carrier (also from China)

------------------
Submitted from: https://mcsl-s.pluginhive.io/home/views/orders/status/allorders

comments.body:
Hello Ibrahim,

Thank you for reaching out. Here are the answers to your two questions:

1. UPS with China origin: Yes, the app supports UPS globally and you can connect a UPS account with China as your ship-from origin. During setup, you would provide your UPS OAuth credentials (Account Number, UPS login, Client ID, and Client Secret), and the origin address can be configured to China (CN) in the app settings.


Regarding the Importer of Record for cost value declaration — the app's UPS international settings include a 'Duties/Taxes Paid By' option where you can designate either the sender or receiver as responsible for duties and taxes. However, could you share a bit more detail about your specific requirement? For example, are you looking to bill duties to a third-party UPS account number, or simply designate the recipient as the importer responsible for customs clearance? This will help us confirm whether the current functionality covers your use case or if there is a gap.


1. YunExpress: YunExpress is not currently integrated with the app. If you could get the required API Documents from YunExpress, along with technical contacts who help us with the YunExpress API connection, we are happy to bring this integration.


Please let us know more about your Importer of Record requirement and we will confirm whether it is supported.

Thanks and regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Ibrahim,
 
Thank you for reaching out. Here are the answers to your two questions:
 
  1. UPS with China origin: Yes, the app supports UPS globally and you can connect a UPS account with China as your ship-from origin. During setup, you would provide your UPS OAuth credentials (Account Number, UPS login, Client ID, and Client Secret), and the origin address can be configured to China (CN) in the app settings.
 
Regarding the Importer of Record for cost value declaration — the app's UPS international settings include a 'Duties/Taxes Paid By' option where you can designate either the sender or receiver as responsible for duties and taxes. However, could you share a bit more detail about your specific requirement? For example, are you looking to bill duties to a third-party UPS account number, or simply designate the recipient as the importer responsible for customs clearance? This will help us confirm whether the current functionality covers your use case or if there is a gap.
 
  1. YunExpress: YunExpress is not currently integrated with the app. If you could get the required API Documents from YunExpress, along with technical contacts who help us with the YunExpress API connection, we are happy to bring this integration.
 
Please let us know more about your Importer of Record requirement and we will confirm whether it is supported.
 
Thanks and regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Ibrahim,

Thank you for sharing the API documentation of the carrier. We also need contact details of a representative from the carrier team (contact number and email ID), so the details can be passed to our team to check possibilities of the integration.
Also, could you let us know if you have an account with Yun Express created?

Best regards,
Sagar K S
PluginHive

comments.body:
Need assistance from @Abhilash / @Keerthi

The customer is looking for a **YunExpress** shipping carrier integration to ship from China.

The customer shared the YunExpress API documentation: https://open.yunexpress.cn/openApi/index
The customer is happy to introduce us to the YunExpress team for further assistance in bringing this integration. They have already contacted the
YunExpress team, and YunExpress is asking for our contact information.

Could you please confirm which contact details we should share? Should we provide Abhilash’s email or the support email?

Also, the customer mentioned that **WeChat** is a faster way to connect. Do we use WeChat for such communication, or should we proceed only through email?
comments.html_body:
Need assistance from @Abhilash / @Keerthi
 
The customer is looking for a YunExpress shipping carrier integration to ship from China.
 
The customer shared the YunExpress API documentation: https://open.yunexpress.cn/openApi/index
The customer is happy to introduce us to the YunExpress team for further assistance in bringing this integration. They have already contacted the 
YunExpress team, and YunExpress is asking for our contact information.
 
Could you please confirm which contact details we should share? Should we provide Abhilash’s email or the support email?
 
Also, the customer mentioned that WeChat is a faster way to connect. Do we use WeChat for such communication, or should we proceed only through email?
